# Automated Audit-Grade Verification Harness

This repository includes an automated evidence suite that checks whether the implementation matches the public claims: canonical addresses, public read-only chamber, separated expert console, wallet operation gates, exact approvals, simulation, typed confirmation, data manifests, and build output.

This is not a law-firm, accounting-firm, or security-firm attestation. It is a reproducible automated audit-grade evidence package designed to make the repository inspectable before production publication.
